title: Autonomous Incident Manager for Site Reliability Engineering
description: An autonomous agent that detects production errors in real time, investigates root causes using AI, generates code patches, and calls on-call engineers via voice to request approval for deployment. Compresses traditional incident response from hours to under 30 seconds.

tools.name: analyze_error
tools.description: Accepts error payload and begins async AI analysis with Gemini

tools.name: generate_patch
tools.description: Generates git-style code patch based on root cause analysis

tools.name: voice_notification
tools.description: Initiates voice call to on-call engineer via Bland AI with incident summary

tools.name: deploy_approval
tools.description: Tracks engineer approval state for automated deployment
